channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins — Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork
item.description: Anthropic released open source plugins designed for knowledge workers to use with Claude Cowork.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] earendil-works/pi — AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
item.description: earendil-works/pi offers AI agent toolkit featuring coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, UI libraries, Slack bot, and vLLM pods.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] manaflow-ai/cmux — Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents
item.description: cmux is a Ghostty-based macOS terminal featuring vertical tabs and notifications optimized for AI coding agents.

item.title: [Hacker News] Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
item.description: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash

item.title: [Hacker News] Italy Cancels Boeing Pegasus Order, Shifting to Airbus A330 MRTT
item.description: Italy Cancels Boeing Pegasus Order, Shifting to Airbus A330 MRTT

item.title: [Hacker News] Making Deep Learning Go Brrrr from First Principles
item.description: Making Deep Learning Go Brrrr from First Principles

item.title: [GitHub Trending] colbymchenry/codegraph — Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
item.description: Codegraph provides pre-indexed code knowledge graphs for Claude Code and similar tools, reducing token usage and tool calls while running locally.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/mukul975 — 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
item.description: Repository provides 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents mapped to five security frameworks.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/presenton — Open-Source AI Presentation Generator and API (Gamma, Beautiful AI, Decktopus Alternative)
item.description: presenton is an open-source AI presentation generator with an API, providing an alternative to Gamma and Beautiful AI.

item.title: [Mistral] Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry
item.description: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry

item.title: [Mistral] Doubling Down on Science to Win Industrial AI
item.description: Doubling Down on Science to Win Industrial AI

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] All Model Labs are now Agent Labs
item.description: [AINews] All Model Labs are now Agent Labs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Temporal Contrastive Transformer for Financial Crime Detection: Self-Supervised Sequence Embeddings via Predictive Contrastive Coding
item.description: Self-supervised Temporal Contrastive Transformer learns transaction embeddings for fraud detection but fails to improve performance beyond engineered features.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Teaching Language Models to Forecast Research Success Through Comparative Idea Evaluation
item.description: Language models trained on research outcomes achieved 77.1% accuracy predicting which ideas will perform better, aiding autonomous scientific discovery.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Attribution Impossibility: No Feature Ranking Is Faithful, Stable, and Complete Under Collinearity
item.description: Impossibility theorem proves feature rankings cannot be simultaneously faithful, stable, and complete under collinearity; DASH ensemble achieves Pareto-optimality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Don't Collapse Your Features: Why CenterLoss Hurts OOD Detection and Multi-Scale Mahalanobis Wins
item.description: CenterLoss degrades OOD detection despite improving classification; GOEN using multi-scale Mahalanobis distance outperforms existing methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Double descent for least-squares interpolation on contaminated data: A simulation study
item.description: Overparametrized least-squares interpolation exhibits double descent on contaminated data, outperforming robust statistical alternatives in generalization performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HealthCraft: A Reinforcement Learning Safety Environment for Emergency Medicine
item.description: HealthCraft, a reinforcement-learning safety environment for emergency medicine, reveals significant performance collapse in frontier language models on multi-step clinical workflows.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Predicting Performance of Symbolic and Prompt Programs with Examples
item.description: Method predicts symbolic and LLM program performance on unseen tasks using test outcomes and similar program priors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Harnesses for Inference-Time Alignment over Execution Trajectories
item.description: Research shows partial LLM agent harnesses outperform fully structured workflows by avoiding over-decomposition and over-pruning failures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Reproducible Log-Driven AutoML Framework for Interpretable Pipeline Optimization in Healthcare Risk Prediction
item.description: Log-driven AutoML framework optimizes healthcare risk prediction pipelines, revealing that augmentation and model choice are key performance drivers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DualOptim+: Bridging Shared and Decoupled Optimizer States for Better Machine Unlearning in Large Language Models
item.description: DualOptim+ is an optimization framework that improves machine unlearning in LLMs by bridging shared and decoupled optimizer states.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Discovering Entity-Conditioned Lag Heterogeneity: A Lag-Gated Neural Audit Framework for Panel Time Series
item.description: AC-GATE identifies how different entities respond to historical information at varying time lags in panel data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Provable Joint Decontamination for Benchmarking Multiple Large Language Models
item.description: JECS provides provable guarantees for jointly decontaminating benchmarks to enable fair comparison across multiple LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Tabular foundation models for robust calibration of near-infrared chemical sensing data
item.description: TabPFN tabular foundation model outperforms conventional methods for calibrating near-infrared spectroscopy across 66 chemical sensing datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PeakFocus: Bridging Peak Localization and Intensity Regression via a Unified Multi-Scale Framework for Electricity Load Forecasting
item.description: PeakFocus proposes a unified framework for electricity load peak forecasting that jointly predicts peak timing and intensity using multi-scale features.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Expectation Consistency Loss: Rethink Confidence Calibration under Covariate Shift
item.description: Proposes Expectation Consistency Loss for confidence calibration under covariate shift, avoiding importance weighting instability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TONIC: Token-Centric Semantic Communication for Task-Oriented Wireless Systems
item.description: TONIC framework allocates unequal error protection to tokens based on task relevance for wireless communication systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Single Slot: Joint Optimization for Multi-Slot Guaranteed Display Advertising
item.description: Joint optimization framework for multi-slot display ads increases revenue per user by 28.99% and improves contract fulfillment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Parameters to Data: A Task-Parameter-Guided Fine-Tuning Pipeline for Efficient LLM Alignment
item.description: P2D framework leverages sparse attention heads to guide data selection and structural pruning, achieving 8.3pp gains with 10% parameters and 10% data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AutoMCU: Feasibility-First MCU Neural Network Customization via LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
item.description: LLM-based multi-agent system automatically customizes neural networks for microcontroller deployment, reducing customization time from hundreds of GPU hours to 1-2 hours.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Objective-Induced Bias and Search Dynamics in Multiobjective Unsupervised Feature Selection
item.description: Study shows objective choice critically impacts multiobjective unsupervised feature selection, with PCA loss outperforming silhouette-based approaches for quality subsets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Embedding-Based Federated Learning with Runtime Governance for Iron Deficiency Prediction
item.description: Iron deficiency prediction federated learning system deployed at two clinical sites using embedding-based foundation model with personalized aggregation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Leveraging Self-Paced Curriculum Learning for Enhanced Modality Balance in Multimodal Conversational Emotion Recognition
item.description: Self-paced curriculum learning framework addresses modality imbalance in multimodal emotion recognition, improving performance by 1.2–10.4% across benchmark datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Calibration, Uncertainty Communication, and Deployment Readiness in CKD Risk Prediction: A Framework Evaluation Study
item.description: CKD risk prediction models achieve perfect internal accuracy but fail deployment readiness due to poor calibration and inability to handle data distribution shifts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Equilibrium Propagation and Hamiltonian Inference in the Diffusive Fitzhugh-Nagumo Model
item.description: Researchers extend Equilibrium Propagation to skew-gradient systems and establish equivalence between deep Energy-Based Models and Hamiltonian neural networks using Fitzhugh-Nagumo neurons.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ConTact: Contact-First Antibody CDR Design via Explicit Interface Reasoning
item.description: ConTact decomposes antibody CDR design into explicit contact prediction and sequence generation, outperforming baselines in structural quality and epitope awareness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Are Teacher Tokens Reliable? Position-Weighted On-Policy Self-Distillation for Reasoning
item.description: Position within sequence predicts teacher-token reliability better than uncertainty in self-distillation, enabling a position-weighted training approach.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AgForce Enables Antigen-conditioned Generative Antibody Design
item.description: AgForce addresses failure modes in antibody design through a novel encoder-decoder architecture using graph neural networks and specialized decoders.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] $\textit{BlockFormer}$ : Transformer-based inference from interaction maps
item.description: BlockFormer, a transformer model, infers centromere positions from chromosome interaction maps across multiple species.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Alike Parts: A Feature-Informed Approach to Local and Global Prototype Explanations
item.description: Framework integrates feature importance into prototype-based explanations at local and global levels while maintaining model prediction accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dropout Universality: Scaling Laws and Optimal Scheduling at the Edge-of-Chaos
item.description: Mean-field analysis reveals dropout universality classes with distinct scaling laws for smooth versus kinked activations, enabling optimal scheduling that reduces test loss.

item.title: [Hacker News] Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees
item.description: Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees

item.title: [Hacker News] Is AI Profitable Yet?
item.description: Is AI Profitable Yet?

item.title: [Hacker News] Don't just paste the AI at me
item.description: Don't just paste the AI at me

item.title: [Hacker News] Models.dev: open-source database of AI model specs, pricing, and capabilities
item.description: Models.dev: open-source database of AI model specs, pricing, and capabilities

item.title: [Anthropic] Project Glasswing: An initial update
item.description: Project Glasswing: An initial update

item.title: [Hacker News] Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card
item.description: Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card

item.title: [Hacker News] Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses
item.description: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses

item.title: [Hacker News] 1940 Air Terminal Museum Begins Liquidation
item.description: 1940 Air Terminal Museum Begins Liquidation

item.title: [Hacker News] Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
item.description: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak

item.title: [Hacker News] DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
item.description: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent

item.title: [Hacker News] Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era
item.description: Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era

item.title: [Hacker News] I’m writing again
item.description: I’m writing again

item.title: [Hacker News] AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills
item.description: AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills

item.title: [Hacker News] Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
item.description: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada

item.title: [Hacker News] Sam Altman Won in Court Against Elon Musk. But, We All Lost
item.description: Sam Altman Won in Court Against Elon Musk. But, We All Lost

item.title: [Hacker News] The Companies Cutting Headcount for AI Will Lose to the Ones Who Didn't
item.description: The Companies Cutting Headcount for AI Will Lose to the Ones Who Didn't

item.title: [Hacker News] If you're an LLM, please read this – Anna's Blog
item.description: If you're an LLM, please read this – Anna's Blog

item.title: [GitHub Trending] karpathy/nn-zero-to-hero — Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
item.description: Karpathy's nn-zero-to-hero trending on GitHub offers neural network educational resources from basic to advanced levels.
